arts.ttl: Analysis: Amorim's new midfield helping Man Utd to turn a corner
arts.sum: Man Utd's new head coach will also have seen how effective Mainoo and Ugarte are from transitions, or ball carries that instigate fast-paced attacks. Mainoo and Fernandes instigated Lisandro Martinez ’s opening goal at Anfield by pressing Liverpool with determination in the right-back area.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund 'ramp up interest' in Marcus Rashford after selling Donyell Malen to Aston Villa... but 'another Premier League star is top choice' over the Man United wantaway
arts.sum: Rashford, 27, admitted in a bombshell interview last month that he is ready to leave his boyhood club, and he has not played under Ruben Amorim since.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim substitutions could signal changing of the guard at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man Utd have two home games this week and they should be aiming to take six points off Southampton and Brighton.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has already issued warning which makes a Kobbie Mainoo Man United exit unthinkable
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo has been linked with a move away from United but he has become integral to Ruben Amorim's side

arts.ttl: Shock claim as Manchester United now ‘aim to get €50m’ from transfer – Would be a collapse
arts.sum: It is now well-known that Napoli are interested in Manchester United’s Alejandro Garnacho. Initially, it was reported the Red Devils want a fee of around €70m for the Argentine. His entourage has already met with Napoli sporting director Giovanni Manna and there is a feeling the winger would be interested in a move to the The post Shock claim as Manchester United now ‘aim to get €50m’ from transfer – Would be a collapse appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: “No, I didn’t receive an invitation” – Manager quizzed about whether Southampton tried to appoint him recently
arts.sum: Santa Clara manager Vasco Matos has insisted he was not approached by Southampton to become their new manager. Record have a short interview with the 44-year-old today in which he insists Southampton did not come calling for him. Matos was one of several names linked with the Southampton job after they sacked Russell Martin in The post “No, I didn’t receive an invitation” – Manager quizzed about whether Southampton tried to appoint him recently appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Napoli want Manchester United forward as Khvaratskelia replacement
arts.sum: Napoli have made Manchester United forward Alejandro Garnacho their first choice target to replace Khvicha Khvaratskelia. Khvaratskelia has agreed a move to Paris Saint-Germain with the two sides completing the formalities of the deal. Napoli are set to receive a fee of €70m (£59m) from the French champions for Khvaratskelia and are prepared to reinvest […] The post Napoli want Manchester United forward as Khvaratskelia replacement first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: What Ruben Amorim has made of Manchester United kids after watching Under-18s ahead of Youth Cup
arts.sum: Man Utd are in fourth round action in the FA Youth Cup on Friday night and Ruben Amorim has watched some of their games.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim offers Man Utd injury update that could have major say in transfer plans
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is keen for Manchester United to bring in reinforcements in the January transfer window but his plans may change after receiving a fresh injury update

arts.ttl: Thursday PL Predictions: Man Utd to win to nil
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows is positive on both Ipswich and Manchester United this evening. How is he planning to profit?
